svg.title: TW-after-TP residual owner gate waterfall
svg.desc: Diagnostic evidence improves TP projection but all TW residual owner release gates remain closed.
svg.text: D2 reduces transfer TP RMSE from 13.57 K to 4.38 K, but TW RMSE remains 12.51 K and no runtime owner is released.

g.text: Wall/core exchange: temporal same-QOI UQ executed for 4 QOIs, but no production harvest, mesh/GCI, heat-flow match, or coefficient release.
Axial mixing and wall-shape transport: diagnostic slope/RMSE signal exists, but no independent source-bounded operator is admitted.
Source placement: D4 variants improve transfer RMSE by up to 18.73 K, but remain empirical upper bounds without source/property release.
Passive boundary/wall conduction: physically plausible lanes exist, but source-backed ambient, area, material, and insulation provenance is incomplete.
Sensor/QOI projection: TP/TW mappings are score-only; runtime temperature inputs remain forbidden.
Storage/transient: named future lane, not part of the current steady runtime model.

svg.text: Fail closed: keep residual explicit. Do not hide missing heat in internal Nu or replay realized CFD wallHeatFlux, mdot, cooler duty, or validation temperatures.
